name: @ryu/calendar-app
description: The Ryu Calendar app: the scheduled-runs calendar — every agent/workflow scheduled job projected onto Month/Week/Day/Agenda views (past runs from history, upcoming runs from cron/interval), with a New automation dialog that schedules an agent. Shipped as a full-page Companion (Path B, ui_format:"html"). Drives Core's /heartbeat/jobs + /workflows + /api/agents through the calendar:crud bridge capability; built to one self-contained HTML via vite-plugin-singlefile. Consumes @ryu/ui components (tree-shaken into the single-file bundle).
